data.title: Charlie Munger's Financial Success and Longevity Advice: 'My Game in Life Was Always To Avoid All Standard Ways of Failing'
data.description: The late billionaire Charlie Munger, who passed away at the age of 99, shared in an interview that there's no hidden formula to achieving financial success and longevity.

data.title: Buffett's Key Lessons in Berkshire Annual Letter: 'Really Outstanding Businesses Are Very Seldom Offered in Their Entirety'
data.description: In his annual letter to Berkshire Hathaway shareholders, Warren Buffett has once again imparted his insights on investing.

data.title: Disney CEO Reveals the One Quality Leaders Should Prioritize, and Why It's So Rare
data.description: Disney CEO Bob Iger recently underscored the significance of hiring employees who exhibit 'genuine decency', a characteristic he feels is frequently undervalued in recruitment.

data.title: Apple Ditches Budget Smartphone Segment With iPhone 16E Launch
data.description: In a strategic shift, Apple has unveiled its latest product, the iPhone 16e, marking its exit from the budget smartphone market.

data.title: Chris Camillo Made $42 Million Trading Stocks Over 15 Years, Here's His Success Strategy
data.description: Investor Chris Camillo has transformed a modest sum of $84,000 into a whopping $42 million over a span of 15 years, leveraging a unique investment strategy known as social arbitrage.
